---
title: ""
format: html
---
```{=html}
<!-- HERO SECTION -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="name-block">
    <div class="hero-name">Alexandar McCulloch</div>
    <hr class="hero-underline">
    <div class="social-icons">
      <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/politicalexplorer.bsky.social" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/bluesky.png" class="icon">
      </a>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/amcculloch" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/linkedin.png" class="icon">
      </a>
    </div>
    <p class="hero-summary">
      Data analyst specializing in political data, nonprofit insights, 
      and interactive R-based tools that make information meaningful.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-buttons">
      <a class="btn github-btn" href="https://github.com/alex-mcculloch" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
      <a class="btn contact-btn" href="contact.qmd">Contact</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section> 

<!-- INTRO SECTION -->
<div class="column-screen">
<section class="intro" id="about">
  <img src="images/profile_pic.jpg" class="intro-pic">
  <div class="intro-text">
    <h2>Hello, I'm Alex</h2>
    <p>
    I'm a data analyst with a background in psychology, political science, research design,
    and nonprofit analytics. I build interactive tools, forecasting models, and 
    data products that empower decision-makers in both civic and private sectors.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>
</div>

<!-- PORTFOLIO CARDS -->
<div class="column-screen">
<section class="portfolio-preview" id="portfolio">
  <h2 class="section-title">Selected Projects</h2>
  <div class="card-grid">
    <div class="card">
      <h3>Congressional Exploerer Tool</h3>
      <p>Explore the members of Congress, their biographies, and bills voted on.</p>
      <a class="card-link" href=https://4blh4z-alex-mcculloch.shinyapps.io/MC_Match/>View Project →</a>
    </div>
    <!--
    <div class="card">
      <h3>Veteran Needs Dashboard</h3>
      <p>ACS and Salesforce-based analysis of veteran needs for nonprofit program design.</p>
      <a class="card-link" href="project2.qmd">View Project →</a>
    </div>
    -->
    <div class="card">
      <h3>Identifying Donors with Machine Learning</h3>
      <p>Use machine learning and Census data to identify high and low income donors.</p>
      <a class="card-link" href="projects/CharityML/DonorsML_portfolio.qmd">View Project →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
</div>


<div class="column-screen">
  <!-- NON-PROFITS SECTION -->
  <section class="nonprofits-preview" id="nonprofits">
    <div class="nonprofits-content">
      <h2 class="section-title">Resources for Nonprofits</h2>
      <p class="nonprofits-description">
        I'm passionate about helping nonprofit organizations leverage data to maximize their impact. 
        Explore free modules covering data collection, visualization, impact measurement, and more—designed 
        specifically for nonprofit teams.
      </p>
      <a class="btn nonprofits-btn" href="nonprofits.qmd">Explore Modules →</a>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>


<!-- SKILLS BUBBLES -->
<section class="skills-section" id="skills">
  <h2 class="section-title">Skills</h2>
  <div class="bubble-container">
    <!-- Programming - top left cluster -->
    <div class="bubble" data-category="programming" style="--size:90px; --x:10%; --y:20px;">R</div>
<!--    <div class="bubble" data-category="programming" style="--size:75px; --x:25%; --y:80px;">Python</div> -->
    
    <!-- Data Visualization - top right cluster -->
    <div class="bubble" data-category="vis" style="--size:85px; --x:60%; --y:10px;">ggplot2</div>
    <div class="bubble" data-category="vis" style="--size:70px; --x:75%; --y:65px;">D3.js</div>
    
    <!-- Statistics & ML - center cluster -->
    <div class="bubble" data-category="ml" style="--size:95px; --x:35%; --y:140px;">Machine Learning</div>
    <div class="bubble" data-category="ml" style="--size:100px; --x:15%; --y:200px;">Forecasting</div>
    
    <!-- Communication - right side -->
    <div class="bubble" data-category="comm" style="--size:80px; --x:70%; --y:150px;">Writing</div>
    <div class="bubble" data-category="comm" style="--size:105px; --x:55%; --y:230px;">Data Stories</div>
    
    <!-- Research - bottom cluster -->
    <div class="bubble" data-category="research" style="--size:110px; --x:25%; --y:290px;">Survey Design</div>
    <div class="bubble" data-category="research" style="--size:95px; --x:60%; --y:320px;">Regression</div>
  </div>
</section>
```
